sigma.title: Suspicious FromBase64String Usage On Gzip Archive - Ps Script
DNS Exfiltration and Tunneling Tools Execution
Suspicious FromBase64String Usage On Gzip Archive - Process Creation

osquery.name: t1132_001_c2_sockets
osquery.query_text: SELECT p.pid, p.name, p.path, p.cmdline, s.remote_address, s.remote_port, s.state FROM process_open_sockets s JOIN processes p ON s.pid = p.pid WHERE s.remote_address != '' AND s.remote_address != '127.0.0.1' AND s.remote_address != '::1' AND s.state = 'ESTABLISHED' LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1132_001_dns_cache
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, fd, socket, remote_address, remote_port FROM process_open_sockets WHERE remote_port = 53 LIMIT 50;

sigma_matches.title: Suspicious FromBase64String Usage On Gzip Archive - Ps Script
DNS Exfiltration and Tunneling Tools Execution

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 8 direct run(s), 4/4 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
